experience.title: Product Owner
experience.description: Created innovation platform for mid-sized exporters to run experiments. Prototyped product ideas using Figma, Make, and Lovable for user testing. Evaluated partner APIs in Postman and created JIRA tickets. Migrated three documentation platforms to Confluence. Enhanced trade financing document integration workflow and automated release notes using Jira scripting.

experience.title: API Specialist
experience.description: Developed and deployed Bright Energy Developer Hub for white-label utility clients. Created product roadmap after discovery process. Established continuous development workflow. Built custom OAS 3.1 definitions with proper naming schemas and polymorphism stored in Github. Deployed improved developer experience using Readme.com SaaS. Created public Postman Team Profile and Workspace with self-service testing capabilities.

experience.title: Product Owner — E-commerce API
experience.description: Built new API suite enabling e-commerce clients to insure Buy Now Pay Later schemes. Relaunched API documentation portal with developer guides. Created Postman Collection and Mock Server for integration testing. Coordinated multiple scrum teams using Jira. Redesigned Single-Invoice.co API version 3 with linear workflow. Streamlined developer onboarding experience.

media.title: Allianz Trade E-commerce API
media.description: API suite for insuring Buy Now Pay Later schemes in e-commerce applications.

experience.title: Product Owner — Tradelock
experience.description: Brought Tradelock Invoice Insurance web app to market for UK SMEs. Connected accounting systems for invoice/buyer insurance selection. A/B tested pricing options based on user interviews. Attended major insurance and accounting conventions. Built partnerships expanding distribution. Developed supervised machine learning model with data scientist to decrease risk. Created automated reporting dashboards using Google Data Studio. Passed penetration testing successfully.

experience.title: Head of Operations — Credable
experience.description: Founding member as Head of Operations managing Credable product suite. Served as Product Owner working with developers and designers. Developed API and developer documentation using Readme platform. Managed web app with BankID login and Insure API with Scrive signing. Evaluated and managed service providers (payment gateways, currency exchange, micro-services). Advised on company-wide services (KYC, e-signing, payments). Curated partnerships with financial/data companies. Supported legal and compliance departments.

media.title: Credable API Documentation
media.description: Comprehensive API docs and integration framework for credit insurance services with BankID and e-signing.

experience.title: Technical Project Manager
experience.description: Managed small to medium agile teams for enterprise digital products. Primary project was Credable for Allianz Trade. Handled stakeholder management across multiple organizational levels. Provided direct support to developers, designers, and strategists to minimize roadblocks.

experience.title: Web Developer
experience.description: Developed custom static websites, Shopify e-commerce sites, WordPress sites, and AMP-only sites. Built analytics dashboard connected to Google Analytics API with Google Charts. Backend in PHP 7.0 with custom Bootstrap template on Azure CDN. Implemented basic login, Zendesk integration, session control, interactive graphs, and monthly reports.

experience.title: SEO Specialist
experience.description: Managed Google Adwords campaigns for international clients. Installed custom Google Tag Manager containers with custom tags. Provided keyword tracking and link reporting via LinkBird API. Set up sitemaps using semantic keyword method to attract organic search.

experience.title: COO
experience.description: Managed operations, international expansion, and fundraising. Created bridge funding analysis for investor pitches. Implemented team operations management and security controls. Managed EU expansion with full language support for iOS/Android applications. Signed PR agencies and brand ambassadors. Developed HTML5/CSS web content and mobile marketing campaigns using Google Adwords and Analytics.

experience.title: Project Manager
experience.description: Managed payment product requirements, design, and production. Managed partner integrations and new payment types. Designed payment products using HTML & CSS with visual feedback elements. Managed agile project management incorporating customer requests. Negotiated partner contracts for development environments.

experience.title: Customer Development Executive
experience.description: Grew customer base from 10 to 200 clients in 8 months. Conducted vertical marketing analysis and reporting. Managed agile project management using Pivotal Tracker with developers. Authored blog articles promoting product awareness.

experience.title: Division Manager
experience.description: Managed sales of two wine labels for largest company account. Trained and managed 10 sales representatives in B2C model. Consulted with CFO on market-based decisions. Managed major sales accounts and provided on-site training. Tripled sales revenue within 20 months.

experience.title: Camp Unit Head
experience.description: Coordinated age groups for Jewish activities and field trips. Led pre-programmed adventure trips for ages 6-16. Taught sports and arts & crafts activities.

experience.title: Apprentice Carpenter
experience.description: Constructed live/work housing complexes and residential high-end renovation. Skills included woodworking, foundation, metal-stud framing, and welding (Arc, TIG & MIG).
